title: Rape on promise of marriage: Karnataka HC pulls up BJP leader's son for failing to maintain victim, child
description: The Karnataka High Court on Tuesday pulled up a BJP leader's son, accused of rape on false promise of marriage, for failing to abide by an earlier court order to deposit money for the maintenance of the survivor and her child [Krishna J Rao Vs State of Karnataka].Justice M Nagaprasanna was hearing petitions filed by Krishna J Rao and his parents seeking quashing of the criminal proceedings initiated against them."Just because the child is from the lower strata of society, are you abandoning the
